title: Warm Visuals
body:
# Warm Visuals
Warm visuals is a resource pack that enhances Minecraft's lighting to be more vibrant and realistic without a significant hit in performance.

Not compatible with other shaders.

Recommended to use with 50% brightness.

Apply the resource pack before playing or change the brightness to take effect.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e740322152de099ba075c01d516a3f696e81f395.jpeg)
